The '''Sith Enforcer''' was a type of well-[[Armor/Legends|armored]] heavy cavalry [[Hovertank|hover tank]] that was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The tanks were specifically modified for use by the [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], led by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. Each of these craft were armed with a supercharged [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] and a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]]. Though effective in one-on-one attacks, Dooku insisted that they travel in groups of three for improved effectiveness.

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], after the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] rescued [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], [[Dark Acolyte Trio|three Dark Acolytes]] attacked [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank/Legends|TX-130 ''Saber''-class fighter tank]], as he made his way to [[Dooku's hangar/Legends|Dooku's hangar]] to confront the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]]. They dealt heavy damage to his tank, but he managed to penetrate their [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], overpowering and destroying them.
